hero.title: Deliberative surveys for better decisions
hero.subtitle: Give every voice a fair hearing. eDemOS helps communities, organizations, and researchers gather nuanced opinions through structured deliberation.

features.title: How it works
features.vote-desc: Participants agree, disagree, or skip on each statement. Simple and fast.
features.submit-desc: Anyone can propose new statements for the community to consider.
features.results-desc: Real-time results show where the group agrees and where opinions diverge.
features.moderate-desc: Moderators review submissions to keep the conversation productive.

usecases.title: Built for
usecases.civic-desc: Let citizens weigh in on local policy, budgets, and community decisions.
usecases.research-desc: Run deliberative surveys with demographic intake and structured data export.
usecases.org-desc: Gather team feedback, prioritize initiatives, and make better group decisions.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Create your first survey in minutes. No credit card required.

about.title: About eDemOS
about.intro: eDemOS is a deliberative survey platform inspired by Pol.is and All Our Ideas. It helps groups discover consensus and understand disagreement through structured participation.
about.how-text: Survey administrators create a set of seed statements on a topic. Participants rate each statement as agree, disagree, or skip, and can mark important ones. They can also submit new statements for moderation. Results show real-time vote distributions, agreement levels, and importance ratings.
about.open-text: eDemOS is designed to be deployed on-premise or used as a hosted service. Survey visibility, privacy, and result access are fully configurable per survey.
about.who-text: Municipalities, universities, NGOs, companies, and anyone who wants to understand what a group really thinks. From classroom feedback to national consultations.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have questions about eDemOS? Want to set up an instance for your organization? Get in touch.

footer.description: Deliberative survey platform for communities and organizations.
